ucs.title: [LLM] HEXANE (Lyceum) RDCMan credential theft via decrypt-rdcman.ps1
ucs.description: Hunts HEXANE's signature post-exploitation step: a PowerShell script (publicly tracked as decrypt-rdcman.ps1 / Get-RDCManCreds) that locates the Remote Desktop Connection Manager settings file and DPAPI-Unprotects stored RDP credentials, fueling the group's ME/Africa lateral movement against telecoms and oil & gas.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.process_name="powershell.exe" OR Processes.process_name="pwsh.exe") AND (Processes.process="*decrypt-rdcman*" OR Processes.process="*Get-RDCManCreds*" OR Processes.process="*Unprotect-RDCMan*" OR Processes.process="*RDCMan.settings*" OR Processes.process="*Remote Desktop Connection Manager*" OR (Processes.process="*Unprotect*" AND Processes.process="*rdcman*") OR (Processes.process="*ProtectedData*" AND Processes.process="*.rdg*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | append [| tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Endpoint.Filesystem where (Filesystem.file_name="RDCMan.settings" OR Filesystem.file_path="*Remote Desktop Connection Manager*" OR Filesystem.file_name="*.rdg") AND (Filesystem.process_name="powershell.exe" OR Filesystem.process_name="pwsh.exe" OR Filesystem.process_name="cmd.exe" OR Filesystem.process_name="wscript.exe" OR Filesystem.process_name="cscript.exe" OR Filesystem.process_name="mshta.exe") by Filesystem.dest Filesystem.user Filesystem.process_name Filesystem.file_path | `drop_dm_object_name(Filesystem)`] | convert ctime(firstTime) ctime(lastTime)
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 7d;
let _rdcman_keywords = dynamic(["decrypt-rdcman","Get-RDCManCreds","Unprotect-RDCMan","RDCMan.settings","Remote Desktop Connection Manager"]);
let ScriptHits =
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (_rdcman_keywords)
         or (ProcessCommandLine has "Unprotect" and ProcessCommandLine has "rdcman")
         or (ProcessCommandLine has "ProtectedData" and ProcessCommandLine has ".rdg")
    | extend Source = "PowerShellScript"
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, Source,
              FileName, ProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessFileName,
              ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              SHA256;
let FileTouches =
    DeviceFileEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
    | where (FileName =~ "RDCMan.settings" or FileName endswith ".rdg"
             or FolderPath has @"\Microsoft\Remote Desktop Connection Manager\")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe")
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("rdcman.exe","mstsc.exe")
    | extend Source = "FileAccess"
    | project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName = InitiatingProcessAccountName, Source,
              FileName, ProcessCommandLine = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              Parent = InitiatingProcessParentFileName,
              ParentCmd = "",
              SHA256;
union ScriptHits, FileTouches
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let lookback = 7d;
let _rdcman_keywords = dynamic(["decrypt-rdcman","Get-RDCManCreds","Unprotect-RDCMan","RDCMan.settings","Remote Desktop Connection Manager"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where EventID == 4688            // requires audit policy + cmdline collection GPO
| where Account !endswith "$"
| where NewProcessName endswith "\\powershell.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\pwsh.exe"
| where CommandLine has_any (_rdcman_keywords)
     or (CommandLine has "Unprotect" and CommandLine has "rdcman")
     or (CommandLine has "ProtectedData" and CommandLine has ".rdg")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine,
          ParentProcessName, TokenElevationType, SubjectUserName
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: HEXANE Lyceum RDCMan Credential Theft via decrypt-rdcman.ps1
id: 7c0e1d4d-0a2c-4b22-9f1f-8d2b3a4f5e10
status: experimental
description: Detects HEXANE/Lyceum's PowerShell-based theft of stored RDP credentials from Remote Desktop Connection Manager (RDCMan.settings / .rdg files) using DPAPI Unprotect calls.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1001/
  - https://www.secureworks.com/research/lyceum-takes-center-stage-in-middle-east-campaign
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/04
tags:
  - attack.credential_access
  - attack.t1555
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.g1001
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_proc:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
  selection_kw:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'decrypt-rdcman'
      - 'Get-RDCManCreds'
      - 'Unprotect-RDCMan'
      - 'RDCMan.settings'
      - 'Remote Desktop Connection Manager'
  selection_pair_unprotect:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'Unprotect'
      - 'rdcman'
  selection_pair_dpapi:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
      - 'ProtectedData'
      - '.rdg'
  condition: selection_proc and (selection_kw or selection_pair_unprotect or selection_pair_dpapi)
falsepositives:
  - Authorized red-team simulating HEXANE TTPs
  - Admins legitimately exporting RDCMan credentials (rare; document and allowlist)
level: high
ucs.rationale: decrypt-rdcman.ps1 / Get-RDCManCreds is a tool family attributed publicly to HEXANE (Secureworks, ClearSky, Kaspersky) and used after foothold to harvest jump-host RDP credentials -- the first step in their telecom/oil-&-gas lateral movement. Generic PowerShell credential-theft rules miss this because the keyword set (RDCMan.settings, Unprotect-RDCMan) is narrow and seldom seen in legitimate admin

ucs.title: [LLM] HEXANE (Siamesekitten) password spray against M365/Exchange via legacy auth from ME/Africa origin
ucs.description: Hunts HEXANE's documented password-spraying tradecraft against externally exposed Exchange/Microsoft 365 of Middle East telecom, ISP, oil & gas and aviation tenants -- using basic/legacy auth protocols (IMAP4, POP3, Exchange ActiveSync, EWS, SMTP AUTH) where MFA is not enforced, with a low per-account try-rate spread across many users from a single IP/ASN.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count dc(Authentication.user) as unique_users values(Authentication.user) as users values(Authentication.app) as apps values(Authentication.action) as outcomes from datamodel=Authentication where Authentication.app IN ("AzureActiveDirectory","Office365","Exchange*","O365*") AND (Authentication.signature_id IN ("Other clients","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync","Authenticated SMTP","Exchange Web Services") OR Authentication.authentication_method IN ("Other clients","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync","Authenticated SMTP")) by Authentication.src Authentication.src_country _time span=15m | `drop_dm_object_name(Authentication)` | where unique_users >= 10 | eval failed=mvfilter(match(outcomes,"failure")), success=mvfilter(match(outcomes,"success")) | where isnotnull(failed) | iplocation src | search NOT src_country IN ("YOUR_HOMELAND") | sort - unique_users
ucs.kql:
let lookback = 1d;
let _legacy_clients = dynamic(["Other clients","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync","Authenticated SMTP","Exchange Web Services","Exchange Online PowerShell"]);
let _expected_countries = dynamic(["United Kingdom","United States"]);  // tune to org footprint
AADSignInEventsBeta
| where Timestamp > ago(lookback)
| where ClientAppUsed in (_legacy_clients)
| where Application has_any ("Office 365","Exchange","Outlook","Microsoft Office","Microsoft 365")
| summarize FailedUsers   = dcountif(AccountUpn, ErrorCode != 0),
            SuccessUsers  = dcountif(AccountUpn, ErrorCode == 0),
            TotalUsers    = dcount(AccountUpn),
            FailedAttempts = countif(ErrorCode != 0),
            SuccessAttempts = countif(ErrorCode == 0),
            ErrorCodes    = make_set(ErrorCode, 10),
            Apps          = make_set(Application, 10),
            Countries     = make_set(Country, 5),
            SampleUsers   = make_set(AccountUpn, 10),
            FirstSeen     = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen      = max(Timestamp)
            by IPAddress
| where TotalUsers >= 10                              // spray fan-out, not single-user brute force
| where FailedUsers >= 10
| where FailedAttempts >= 25                          // P95 baseline = ~6 fails/IP/day
| where Countries !has_any (_expected_countries)      // origin outside org footprint
| extend SuccessfulSpray = iif(SuccessUsers >= 1, "YES - investigate compromised account(s) immediately", "no")
| order by SuccessUsers desc, TotalUsers desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
let lookback = 1d;
let _legacy_clients = dynamic(["Other clients","IMAP4","POP3","Exchange ActiveSync","Authenticated SMTP","Exchange Web Services","Exchange Online PowerShell"]);
let _expected_countries = dynamic(["GB","US"]);     // tune to org footprint (ISO codes)
let Interactive = SigninLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | extend Country = tostring(parse_json(LocationDetails).countryOrRegion);
let NonInteractive = AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
    | extend Country = tostring(parse_json("{}")["x"]) ;  // placeholder for schema parity
Interactive
| where ClientAppUsed in (_legacy_clients)
| where AppDisplayName has_any ("Office 365","Exchange","Outlook","Microsoft Office","Microsoft 365")
| summarize FailedUsers     = dcountif(UserPrincipalName, ResultType != 0),
            SuccessUsers    = dcountif(UserPrincipalName, ResultType == 0),
            TotalUsers      = dcount(UserPrincipalName),
            FailedAttempts  = countif(ResultType != 0),
            SuccessAttempts = countif(ResultType == 0),
            ResultTypes     = make_set(ResultType, 10),
            Apps            = make_set(AppDisplayName, 10),
            Countries       = make_set(Country, 5),
            SampleUsers     = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10),
            FirstSeen       = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen        = max(TimeGenerated)
            by IPAddress, AutonomousSystemNumber
| where TotalUsers >= 10                              // spray fan-out
| where FailedUsers >= 10
| where FailedAttempts >= 25                          // empirical noise floor
| where Countries !has_any (_expected_countries)      // outside expected geography
| extend SuccessfulSpray = iff(SuccessUsers >= 1, "YES - validate compromised account(s)", "no")
| order by SuccessUsers desc, TotalUsers desc
ucs.rationale: HEXANE / Lyceum / Siamesekitten / Spirlin is publicly documented (Secureworks 2019, ClearSky 2021, Kaspersky 2021) for low-and-slow password spraying against Internet-exposed Exchange/OWA/M365 of Middle East and African telecoms, ISPs and oil & gas firms -- specifically abusing legacy/basic-auth protocols which bypass modern conditional access and MFA. The detection anchors on the actor's exact pi
